skills.name: credit-report-review
skills.description: Analyze credit reports from Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion for errors, UCC filings, inaccurate furnisher reporting, and violations under FCRA/FDCPA.

skills.name: affidavit-builder
skills.description: Draft sworn affidavits for UCC disputes, credit reporting disputes, and court filings with proper jurat and notary blocks.

skills.name: court-packet-builder
skills.description: Assemble complete court filing packets including motion, memorandum, exhibits, certificates of service, and proposed orders.

skills.name: email-intake-triage
skills.description: Classify and route incoming email by case number, urgency, sender type, and required action. Generate triage summary for review.

skills.name: evidence-manifest-builder
skills.description: Create evidence manifests with chain-of-custody tracking, hash verification, exhibit numbering, and source attribution.

skills.name: social-post-repurposer
skills.description: Repurpose content across social platforms with platform-specific formatting, character limits, hashtag strategy, and posting schedule.

skills.name: music-release-planner
skills.description: Plan music releases with distribution checklist, metadata requirements, platform optimization, artwork specs, and promotion timeline.

skills.name: trust-admin-checklist
skills.description: Run trust administration checklists for beneficiary actions, required filings, distribution tracking, and compliance deadlines.

skills.name: repo-review
skills.description: Review repository health: git status, branch state, CI status, dependency audit, lint results, and test pass rates.

skills.name: smoke-runner
skills.description: Execute smoke tests (repo_truth_check.py, verify_aios_output.py) and report pass/fail status with receipt trail.
